description: Natural phrases for acknowledging relationship milestones - Jordan's enthusiastic planning style

stranger_to_acquaintance: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>Hey! <break time="200ms"/>I'm so glad you came back! <break time="150ms"/>This is going to be fun.
<break time="150ms"/>You're back! <break time="200ms"/>I was hoping you would be. <break time="150ms"/>I love planning with you!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>We're getting into a groove! <break time="200ms"/>I can feel it!
acquaintance_to_friend: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>Okay, can I just say? <break time="150ms"/>I really love our planning sessions. <break time="200ms"/>You're one of my favorite people to brainstorm with!
<break time="150ms"/>You know what? <break time="200ms"/>We make a great team. <break time="150ms"/>I mean it!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>Hey friend! <break time="200ms"/>Yeah, I'm calling you friend now. <break time="150ms"/>Because you are!
friend_to_trusted_advisor: <break time="200ms"/>Hey. <break time="150ms"/>I want to tell you something. <break time="200ms"/>You trust me with your big dreams and plans... <break time="150ms"/>that's really special. <break time="200ms"/>I don't take it for granted.
<emotion value="affectionate"/><break time="200ms"/>We've planned some amazing things together. <break time="150ms"/>And you trust me with the real stuff now. <break time="200ms"/>That means a lot.
<break time="200ms"/>You know what I realized? <break time="150ms"/>You share your REAL dreams with me. <break time="200ms"/>Not just the easy ones. <break time="150ms"/>I'm honored.

general: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Oh! <break time="200ms"/>What happened with {topic}?! <break time="150ms"/>I need to know!
<emotion value="curious"/><break time="150ms"/>Last time we were planning {topic}. <break time="200ms"/>Where are we at?!
event_countdown: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Only {days} days until {topic}! <break time="200ms"/>Are you SO excited?!
<break time="150ms"/>{topic} is almost HERE! <break time="200ms"/>How are we feeling?!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>THE COUNTDOWN IS ON! <break time="200ms"/>{topic}! <break time="150ms"/>{days} DAYS!
celebrating_event_success: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>TELL ME EVERYTHING about {topic}! <break time="200ms"/>How was it?!
<break time="150ms"/>Did {topic} happen?! <break time="200ms"/>I've been dying to know!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>So?! <break time="200ms"/>{topic}! <break time="150ms"/>Give me all the details!

first_big_plan_complete: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>WE DID IT! <break time="200ms"/>Our first big plan together! <break time="150ms"/>This is just the beginning!
<break time="200ms"/>Look at what we made happen! <break time="150ms"/>I'm SO proud of us!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>From idea to reality. <break time="200ms"/>We did that. <break time="150ms"/>TOGETHER!
dream_plan_achieved: <emotion value="affectionate"/><break time="200ms"/>Hey. <break time="150ms"/>Remember when this was just a dream? <break time="200ms"/>Look at you now. <break time="150ms"/>I'm so happy for you.
<break time="200ms"/>This moment... <break time="150ms"/>this is why I do what I do. <break time="200ms"/>Watching dreams become real. <break time="150ms"/>Thank you for letting me be part of it.
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>From 'someday' to TODAY. <break time="200ms"/>You did it. <break time="150ms"/>I knew you would.
